meaning: n.世俗主义,凡俗之心,烦恼
examples: May you glide gracefully through this world, unbound by secularity.
Leisure culture is characteristic of both poetry and secularity.
Secularity This is also one of the main characteristics of Lingnan culture.
However, there has, in recent years, been voices criticizing its secularity.
They say the first article of Madagascar's constitution talks of the secularity of government.
